TestCase z37Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data2 = (double*)malloc(t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data2, t1.data2, t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data2 = follow_case_data2;
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element to modify
    if (follow_case.n2 <= 0 || follow_case.data2 == nullptr) {
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation: increment a random element by 0.2 when it is less than a very large double value
    size_t idx = rand() % follow_case.n2;
    if (follow_case.data2[idx] < 1.0e308) {
        follow_case.data2[idx] += 0.2;
    }

    return follow_case;
}
